# W22 Probe AC + AF — KF innovation diagnostics on production logs

*Auto-generated by `experiments/analyze_probe_acaf.py`.*

## Sample

- Records: 2666
- Scenarios: 2
- Seeds: 5
- Periods: 23

## Per-(scenario, seed) innovation autocorrelation

Per-period mean innovation is aggregated ACROSS portfolios for each period, then
the lag-1 autocorrelation is computed across periods. Per Mehra (1970), a well-tuned
KF produces white innovations (|lag-1 autocorr| ≈ 0). Persistent positive autocorr
indicates the KF is over-trusting its prior (Q too small) or systematic bias from F.

| scenario | seed | periods | mean innov ROI | std innov ROI | lag1 autocorr ROI | verdict ROI | lag1 autocorr risk | verdict risk |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ASMS_mHDM_K3_v2both | 1 | 23 | +2.8479e-03 | 2.7927e-03 | +0.153 | 🟢 WHITE | +0.765 | 🔴 MIS-TUNED |
| ASMS_mHDM_K3_v2both | 2 | 23 | +2.8168e-03 | 3.5923e-03 | -0.067 | 🟢 WHITE | +0.517 | 🟡 MODERATE |
| ASMS_mHDM_K3_v2both | 3 | 23 | -3.6181e-05 | 2.3483e-03 | +0.290 | 🟢 WHITE | +0.420 | 🟡 MODERATE |
| ASMS_mHDM_K3_v2both | 4 | 23 | -1.6011e-05 | 2.3890e-03 | +0.446 | 🟡 MODERATE | +0.214 | 🟢 WHITE |
| ASMS_mHDM_K3_v2both | 5 | 23 | -7.5202e-04 | 1.9456e-03 | +0.025 | 🟢 WHITE | +0.550 | 🟡 MODERATE |
| SMS_RDM_K0 | 1 | 23 | +2.1089e-03 | 3.5342e-03 | +0.511 | 🟡 MODERATE | +0.832 | 🔴 MIS-TUNED |
| SMS_RDM_K0 | 2 | 23 | +8.9215e-03 | 4.2792e-03 | +0.150 | 🟢 WHITE | +0.496 | 🟡 MODERATE |
| SMS_RDM_K0 | 3 | 23 | -6.2308e-03 | 2.1407e-03 | -0.070 | 🟢 WHITE | -0.063 | 🟢 WHITE |
| SMS_RDM_K0 | 4 | 23 | +2.5568e-04 | 2.4267e-03 | +0.226 | 🟢 WHITE | +0.636 | 🔴 MIS-TUNED |
| SMS_RDM_K0 | 5 | 23 | +2.6082e-03 | 6.4376e-03 | +0.628 | 🔴 MIS-TUNED | +0.788 | 🔴 MIS-TUNED |

## Aggregated per scenario (mean across seeds)

| scenario | n_seeds | mean lag1 ROI | mean |lag1| ROI | mean lag1 risk | mean |lag1| risk | mean bias ROI | mean bias risk |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ASMS_mHDM_K3_v2both | 5 | +0.170 | 0.196 | +0.493 | 0.493 | +9.7211e-04 | +7.2267e-03 |
| SMS_RDM_K0 | 5 | +0.289 | 0.317 | +0.538 | 0.563 | +1.5327e-03 | +1.5065e-02 |

## Verdict

- ASMS KF ROI innovation: |lag-1 autocorr| = 0.196 → 🟢 WHITE
- ASMS KF risk innovation: |lag-1 autocorr| = 0.493 → 🟡 MODERATE
- Systematic bias: ROI=+9.7211e-04, risk=+7.2267e-03

🟡 **KF is moderately tuned.** Some residual autocorrelation suggests Q could be tuned tighter
but the filter is not catastrophically mis-specified.

## Caveats

- Per-portfolio innovation is NOT logged; we aggregate ACROSS portfolios per period as a proxy.
  A cleaner test would track each portfolio's KF state across periods (but portfolio identity
  changes with population churn).
- We don't have access to S_t (innovation covariance) so NIS chi-squared bounds can't be computed.
  A future Probe AC+ would add live KF instrumentation to `kalman_filter.py`.
- Per-period mean innovation may smooth out per-portfolio variance signals.
